Notes: A perfect sci-fi horror film, definitely a must see for everyone!
Action-orientated approach to the universe, very different from the first, but still an amazing film.
A disappointment compared to the first two films, I still enjoyed it but it was nowhere near as good.
A fun film and a slight improvement on Alien 3, but still a long way from the greatness of Alien.
Good but not great, the film itself wasn't bad, but I wish it wasn't set in the Alien universe.
A shameful addition to the series.
A must see for all Alien fans who have been longing for a taste of old school sci-fi horror.
